title: Subdistricts collection (per state)
description: All subdistricts (taluks / tehsils / mandals — the unit varies by state) within a single state, keyed by LGD numeric code. Analogous to district.schema.json. One file per state at datasets/reference/in/states/<S>/subdistricts.json. Joined to datasets/boundaries/in/geojson/<S>-subdistricts.geojson via lgd_code (matches the GeoJSON feature property `subdist_lgd`). Per TODO/TN-GRANULAR-GEO-PLAN.md Phase 0 and ADR-0019 amendment promoting subdistrict_lgd_code to first-class canonical column.

x-changelog.description: Initial schema. Per-state subdistrict registry mirroring district.schema.json shape. Required fields: id, id_source, name, district_id (parent district id, same id_source). Optional: lgd_code (numeric, required when id_source=lgd), name_alt, name_source, created_on, split_from. Top-level: $schema, $schema_version, sources, state, subdistricts. Created for TN granular-geo pipeline; emitted from datasets/reference/in/lgd/subdistricts-latest.csv (ramSeraph opendata mirror) joined to existing per-state districts.json via parent district_lgd.

Additive: optional `name_ta` (Tamil-script localised name) on each subdistrict item. Tooltip / search affordance only — never an identifier. Lands in the same arc as its consumer (IndicatorChoropleth tooltip in TN drill-down — Phase 4 of TODO/TN-GRANULAR-GEO-PLAN.md, Fowler YAGNI). Existing v1.0 data files re-validate unchanged.

sources.description: Provenance per CLAUDE.md §12 / ADR-0002. Each entry is one upstream URL plus the timestamp our pipeline fetched it. An empty array signals hand-authored content.

state.description: ECI state code that this collection belongs to.

id.description: Stable identifier. LGD numeric code (preferred) or Wikipedia URL slug (fallback).

lgd_code.description: LGD numeric subdistrict code. Join key against the <S>-subdistricts.geojson feature property `subdist_lgd`. Required when id_source=lgd.

name_ta.description: Optional Tamil-script localised name (e.g. "போளூர்"). Tooltip / search affordance only — never an identifier. v1.1.

name_alt.description: Optional alternate canonical name where upstream LGD and citizen-recognised name diverge. Tooltip / search affordance only — never an identifier.

district_id.description: Parent district id. MUST resolve into the same state's districts.json under the same id_source.

split_from.description: Parent subdistrict ids (same id_source) if this subdistrict was carved out.
